name: Youssou N’Dour
abstract: Youssou "Madjiguène" N'Dour (also Ndour, French: [jusu (ɛ)nduʁ]; Wolof: Yuusu "Maajigéen" Nduur [juːsu ⁿd̺uːɾ]; born 1 October 1959) is a Senegalese singer, songwriter, musician, composer, and politician. N'Dour helped develop a style of popular Senegambian music known as mbalax, a genre that has sacred origins in the Serer music njuup t…

about_quotes.speaker: Catherine Russell
about_quotes.evidence: Many of us have done a lot of TV work behind many people, Paul Simon, Youssou N’Dour, Snoop Dogg, you know, Al Green...
about_quotes.doc_title: Catherine Russell interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, October 26, 2018

about_quotes.speaker: Warren Bernhardt
about_quotes.evidence: The best show I ever saw in my life was here at the Bearsville Theater with Youssou N’Dour.
about_quotes.doc_title: Warren Bernhardt interviewed by Monk Rowe, Bearsville, New York, January 3, 2012
